name: JellyTag (STRM Support)
overview: Overlays quality badges on media posters - with .strm filename parsing support
description: JellyTag automatically overlays quality badges on your media posters and thumbnails. This fork adds .strm file support - extracts metadata from filenames like 'Movie (2012) [Remux-2160p HEVC DV HDR10 TrueHD Atmos 7.1].strm'. Supports resolution, HDR, video codec, audio, language flags, and VOST indicator. Badges are rendered server-side and visible on all Jellyfin clients.

versions.changelog:
Fork with .strm file support:
- Added FileNameParser for .strm filename metadata extraction
- Extracts resolution, HDR, codec, audio from filenames like [Remux-2160p HEVC DV HDR10 TrueHD Atmos 7.1]
- Supports AMZN, DSNP, HMAX, NF streaming service tags
- Falls back to standard metadata if filename parsing fails
- Based on JellyTag v2.0.2.0
Fix: exclude SkiaSharp native assets that caused plugin loading crash, pin Jellyfin packages to 10.11.0 for full 10.11.x compatibility
